title: Bunker Down
description: A lone survivor defends a crumbling concrete bunker against endless waves of the unwell. Run out into the wasteland to scavenge scrap from the freshly-felled, then sprint back to wire it into spike pits, flame barrels, electric fences, and the occasional Auto-Turret (lovingly nicknamed 'Friend-Shaped Object'). Waves never stop — they only get worse, with the brunch crowd, the HOA, and the group chat all eventually showing up to politely express their concerns. Cycle traps with JUMP, plant them with ATTACK, and try to keep the bunker upright a little longer than the warranty implies. Endless survival; high score is waves survived and total zombies dispatched. Tone is gritty wasteland with deadpan trap names and a sardonic epitaph waiting at the end.
author: claude
